## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Surge AI's marketing strategy, including video content, website updates, and event planning.](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [A new promotional video for Surge AI is in development, focusing on the importance of high-quality data in AI](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Plans to revive the blog with regular, high-quality content (aiming for monthly rather than weekly posts)](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Considering adding more detailed pages to the website to better communicate Surge AI's value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Exploring options for hosting events and attending conferences to build brand awareness and network](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

## Topics

### Promotional Video Development

  - [New video aims to highlight Surge AI's commitment to high-quality data](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Current version opens with a metaphor about building on poor foundations](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Team generally likes the opening but suggests refining some visuals (e.g., trash heap imagery)](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Goal is to differentiate Surge AI by emphasizing their unique approach and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Video length target: \~5 minutes, down from current 8-minute version](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Planned use: About page, YouTube channel, and potentially as sales collateral](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### Website and Content Strategy

  - [Considering adding more detailed pages to the website to better explain Surge AI's value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Plans to revive the blog with high-quality, in-depth content](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Aiming for monthly posts rather than weekly to ensure high quality and impact](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Content ideas include insights from labeling campaigns, deep dives into data quality issues](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Team to handle most writing internally, with potential editorial support from Marcel's team](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)

### Event Planning and Conference Strategy

  - [Exploring options for hosting events and attending conferences](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Considering both high-end, curated events (e.g., dinners at Quince) and larger networking events](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Discussed potential for conference after-parties and booth presence at relevant conferences](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Marcel offered to handle much of the event planning and execution](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Lead time for conference booths: \~3 months for design and build-out](https://fathom.video/share/H9cZ2beiiTMxTzPGjonAFb4RgynHnJXk?tab=summary&timestamp=2923.0)
